body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- agent 4 added. Installed forge-parallel (FORGE-PARALLEL_THESIS.md) as the fourth forge-family skill: not a trading lane, its the shadow-track/monotonic-ratchet/PBO/ceiling-awareness substrate the other three agents run on, plus the conductor that dispatches independent upgrades across specialists and sequences dependent ones by the phase DAG. Confirmed by its own composition table that the WARRANT#33-40 work already shipped this session (Living-Edge cells, dwell, relationship measurement, driver fingerprint) IS forge-edge-2s and forge-indicates shadow-track content per forge-parallel doctrine -- conducted, not duplicated, and correctly still unpromoted (nothing wired into a live decision). Updated the tungsten-smithing coordinator skill to reference all 4 agents and the current warrant lineage (#33-40, next is #41). No code changes to TUNGSTEN itself from this addition -- pure skill installation.
